decisions.title: Scale GetStructuredData API or migrate to Edge architecture
decisions.context: ENG-8958 signals API latency issues. With Sift Edge (ENG-8858) in development and Embed Deeper pillar focus, we need to decide whether to optimize current API or accelerate Edge rollout to handle data-intensive workloads closer to customers.

arguments.for: Edge architecture aligns with Build the Moat strategy, provides differentiated performance, supports Decisions Captured north star by enabling real-time workflows
arguments.against: Edge requires infrastructure investment, customer migration effort, and delays immediate latency relief; short-term API optimization could buy time

decisions.title: Prioritize E2 GA readiness vs new Canvas features
decisions.context: Multiple E2 issues (ENG-9347, ENG-9181, ENG-9134, ENG-9412) plus UX work (DES-20) suggest feature still needs hardening. Canvas is key to Explore V2 strategy but stability gates adoption. Need to decide feature freeze date.

arguments.for: Nail the Core requires stability first; GA quality drives adoption and Decisions Captured metric; technical debt compounds if not addressed
arguments.against: Competitive pressure requires feature velocity; customers waiting for stat-based panels and calculated channel improvements; can ship with known limitations

decisions.title: Invest in K2 Mission data pipeline now or defer for Canvas completion
decisions.context: ENG-9104, ENG-9270, ENG-9255 indicate new K2 Mission work starting. With Kafka contract design and Parquet schema in flight, this represents significant backend investment while frontend has stability issues.
decisions.blockedBy: Unclear customer commitment or revenue tied to K2 Mission timeline; dependencies between K2 pipeline and existing data infrastructure unclear

arguments.for: Build the Moat through differentiated data capabilities; K2 may unlock new customer segment; parallel workstreams keep backend team productive
arguments.against: Spreads engineering thin while core products need stabilization; risk of creating another incomplete feature; should sequence after E2 GA

decisions.title: Keycloak session handling: hotfix or architectural redesign
decisions.context: ENG-8293 shows app enters redirect loop after session expiration - critical auth issue affecting all users. Impacts Embed Deeper if customers can't reliably stay logged in. Quick fix vs proper session management architecture.

arguments.for: Auth reliability is table stakes; every failed session is lost decision capture opportunity; hotfix gets immediate relief while planning proper fix
arguments.against: Hotfixes create technical debt; Keycloak HA work (ENG-9416) already in progress suggests architectural approach better; one-time fix vs ongoing bandaids

decisions.title: Internal CLI tool distribution strategy
decisions.context: ENG-8933 for packaging internal CLI tooling. With Python Rules in product strategy, need to decide if this becomes customer-facing SDK or stays internal. Impacts Build the Moat through developer experience.

arguments.for: Customer-facing CLI enables power users, supports Python Rules adoption, creates moat through tooling ecosystem; internal use validates before external release
arguments.against: Support burden for external CLI; documentation and stability requirements higher; should validate Python Rules demand first before expanding surface area

timeAudit.weekSummary: Heavy engineering coordination week with multiple critical path items converging (E2 stability, K2 design, Edge deployment). Auth issue demands immediate attention.
alerts: Decision backlog building: 5 open decisions with dependencies spanning 3 pillars
Nail the Core pillar at risk: 8 critical bugs + API latency + auth reliability all active
North Star metric blind: No instrumentation to measure Decisions Captured - add to roadmap
Resource spread risk: K2 Mission, E2 hardening, Edge deployment, and infrastructure all active simultaneously
Missing amplitude events: ENG-9235 not complete means feature adoption data still unavailable

events.title: URGENT: Keycloak session fix decision
events.description: ENG-8293 blocks user productivity. Decide hotfix vs architectural fix. Auth reliability is table stakes for Embed Deeper.

events.title: E2 GA feature freeze decision
events.description: Determine if E2 enters stabilization mode or continues feature development. 8 critical bugs require resolution path.

events.title: K2 Mission go/no-go
events.description: Unblock ENG-9104 decision - proceed with data pipeline work or defer. Need customer commitment clarity.

events.title: API latency triage complete
events.description: ENG-8958 root cause identified, decision on Edge vs optimization ready for Mar 26 deadline.

events.title: GetStructuredData API decision
events.description: Choose Edge acceleration path vs API optimization. Impacts Build the Moat timeline and customer experience.

events.title: Family stats amplitude instrumentation live
events.description: ENG-9235 complete - enables measuring Embed Deeper adoption via feature usage analytics.

events.title: User group policy conditions shipped
events.description: ENG-9098 + ENG-9418 deployed. Key Embed Deeper capability for enterprise customers.

events.title: EKS cluster deployment complete
events.description: ENG-9165 done - unblocks Sift Edge pilot testing and Build the Moat progress.

events.title: Internal CLI distribution strategy
events.description: ENG-8933 completion path decided - internal only or customer-facing SDK for Python Rules enablement.

events.title: E2 GA readiness review
events.description: Assess if all critical bugs resolved, calculated channels stable, UX polish complete. Go/no-go for GA announcement.

events.title: K2 Kafka contract finalized
events.description: ENG-9270 complete - enables DFS integration work and data pipeline prototype. Build the Moat deliverable.

events.title: Sift Edge first pilot customer deployment
events.description: ENG-8858 metrics validate, EKS ready. First real-world Edge deployment validates Build the Moat architecture.

events.title: North Star instrumentation decision
events.description: Close measurement gap for Decisions Captured Per Customer. Define events, implement tracking, establish baseline.
